title: Puerto Banus Boat Rental for Birthday: Costs and Tips 2026
html:
Puerto Banus, with its glitzy marina and proximity to Marbella, is a prime spot for a memorable birthday celebration afloat. Renting a motor or sailing boat from the marina typically costs from €80 per person for a shared tour, or upwards of €600 for a private half-day charter, with options bookable through the BoatHire24 marketplace.

How much does it cost to rent a boat for a birthday in Puerto Banus?

A private birthday boat charter in Puerto Banus typically costs between €600 and €2,500 for a half-day, depending on the boat size and amenities. For a group of 8-12 guests, a standard motorboat half-day runs from €800 to €1,200. Catamarans accommodating 10-20 people start at €1,500 for four hours, and luxury yachts with a crew can exceed €3,000. Shared party boat tours cost around €80-€120 per person and often include drinks. To compare options, you can browse day charters in Puerto Banus on the platform.

Where to set off in Puerto Banus

The main departure point is Puerto Banus marina itself, a glamorous harbour lined with designer shops and restaurants. Other nearby options include Marbella's Real Club Náutico de Marbella, just 3 nautical miles east, and the smaller Cabopino Marina west of the port. From here, you can head to the beaches of San Pedro de Alcántara, the exclusive Marbella Club area, or east towards the scenic La Concha mountain backdrop. Many charters also cruise to the island of Isla de las Palomas off the coast of Gibraltar, about 40 nautical miles south. BoatHire24 connects you with skippers who know the best anchorages in the Bay of Marbella.

Which boat to rent

The best boat for a birthday depends on your group size, budget, and desired activities, with motor yachts offering speed and luxury, while catamarans provide stability and space.

  1. Motor yacht (40-50ft), Ideal for a stylish party with up to 12 guests, featuring a flybridge and sun pads; from €1,200 for four hours.
  2. Catamaran (42-48ft), Spacious and stable, perfect for groups of 10-16, with a large deck and trampolines; from €1,500 for four hours.
  3. Rib or speedboat, For a small group of 6-8 wanting water sports like tubing or wakeboarding; from €600 for two hours.
  4. Luxury yacht (Sunseeker or Azimut), For a VIP birthday with a crew, jacuzzi, and up to 20 guests; from €2,500 for half a day.

For example, you can review the Salty Sun Charters charter page to see a 40-foot motor yacht based in Puerto Banus, suitable for groups of up to 12.

What are the costs broken down by type?

  • Shared party tour: €80-€120 per person, usually lasting 3-4 hours with drinks included.
  • Small motorboat half-day: €600-€1,000 for up to 8 guests, no crew included.
  • Catamaran full-day charter: €2,000-€3,500 for 8-16 guests, often with skipper and host.
  • Crewed luxury yacht (full day): €3,500-€6,000 for up to 12 guests, with premium catering.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Puerto Banus?

If you rent with a skipper, no licence is required, but for bareboat charter you need a valid ICC or equivalent Spanish licence. Most birthday charters in Puerto Banus include a professional skipper who handles navigation and safety. For self-drive hire, the operator will confirm the exact licence requirements, typically a Patron de Embarcaciones de Recreo for inland waters and a PER for coastal trips. BoatHire24 listings state licence needs clearly.

Local tip: book your birthday charter at least three weeks ahead in July and August, the high season months when the Poniente wind can make the sea choppier in the afternoon, so a morning trip offers calmer conditions and better photo light along the Costa del Sol.

At a glance

  • Price band: €80 (shared) to €6,000+ (luxury crewed yacht)
  • Peak months: June to September, especially August
  • Trip length: 3-8 hours, half-day or full-day
  • Guest capacity: 6-20 guests on typical birthday charters
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Puerto Banus

Can I bring my own cake and decorations for a birthday on board?

Most skippers allow decorations and a birthday cake, but check the charter terms as some may have restrictions on open flames or glitter that could damage the upholstery.

Is it possible to swim and use water toys during the charter?

Yes, many boats in Puerto Banus include a swim ladder, paddleboard, and snorkel gear, especially if you anchor near the Cabopino sandbanks or the Marbella shoreline.

What happens if the weather is bad on my birthday?

The skipper decides on safety; if rough seas force cancellation, most operators offer a rescheduled date or full refund, as stated in the BoatHire24 booking policy.

BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Puerto Banus or list your own. For your upcoming birthday, plan afloat with confidence by checking verified boats and skippers on the BoatHire24 marketplace. If you own a boat, consider becoming a host and earning income by listing it for birthday charters in Puerto Banus in 2026.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Puerto Banus and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
